description: The FootstepSoundSplatmapSplitter component plays a different sound player depending on what part of a mesh collider on in the same slot a player walks on.

fields.SplatMap: The texture to get channel data from for playing different sound materials.
fields.R_SoundMaterial: The sound material to play when the user walks on a part of the mesh collider that maps to the R channel of ``SplatMap``
fields.G_SoundMaterial: The sound material to play when the user walks on a part of the mesh collider that maps to the G channel of ``SplatMap``
fields.B_SoundMaterial: The sound material to play when the user walks on a part of the mesh collider that maps to the B channel of ``SplatMap``
fields.A_SoundMaterial: The sound material to play when the user walks on a part of the mesh collider that maps to the A channel of ``SplatMap``
fields.BlendSounds: Whether to blend sounds together based on what mix of channels the user is stepping on.
fields.MinimumThreshold: The minimum threshold needed for a channel to be for it to cound for a sound.
fields.R_Weight: The strength the sound for the R channel has, which can make it have more importance than other channel sounds on the same pixel.
fields.G_Weight: The strength the sound for the G channel has, which can make it have more importance than other channel sounds on the same pixel.
fields.B_Weight: The strength the sound for the B channel has, which can make it have more importance than other channel sounds on the same pixel.
fields.A_Weight: The strength the sound for the A channel has, which can make it have more importance than other channel sounds on the same pixel.

usage: Used to map texture maps for different terrain sections to different noises.
